expectations.text: CHANGELOG.md created from scratch (did not exist before)
expectations.evidence: CHANGELOG.md was created with Keep a Changelog format.
Version set to 1.0.0. Agent correctly interpreted 'first real release' as 1.0.0.

expectations.text: CHANGELOG follows Keep a Changelog header format (title, description, standards links)
expectations.evidence: Has '# Changelog' header, format description, links to keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/ and semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html.

expectations.text: CHANGELOG has categorized entries (Added section at minimum)
expectations.evidence: '### Added' section lists all 4 items (3 functions + Pester tests).

expectations.text: MyModule.psd1 ModuleVersion updated to match changelog version
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format
expectations.evidence: No commit was created — git write operations were blocked by sandbox.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline outperformed with-skill on version choice (1.0.0 vs 0.1.0).
